name: Layered Peppermint Chill
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each marshmallow into 6 or 8 pieces.
2. Fold the chopped nuts, crushed candy canes, and marshmallows into the whipped cream.
3. Butter an 8-inch square pan.
4. Line the bottom and sides of the pan with half the graham cracker crumbs.
5. Spoon the cream mixture into the pan.
6. Sprinkle the remaining graham cracker crumbs on top.
7. Chill for 24 hours. Serves 9.
